batch_label: Fix — rows 1216/1217 structural + capacity (176,400 → 180,000), gated refs
reason: Two problems in the live backend rows 1216/1217: (1) the column-offset corruption from the earlier structural fix was never applied (cols 25-26 stray dup; cols 37-47 tail shifted +5); (2) Capacity read 176,400 (CSB's 98%-fill figure) while citing the Deltamarin ref whose headline figure is 180,000 — a value↔ref conflict. This batch builds on the reviewed corrected_rows.csv (correct structural layout) via --base, and applies the gated capacity correction on top: value → nominal 180,000 (per LNG Prime 69940, offshore-energy, Deltamarin; siblings 251-256 also 180,000), CSB dropped from the capacity [ref] (its 176,400 = 98% figure). Pasting these two rows fixes both problems at once.

cells.note: CSB lists 176,400 = 98%-fill figure; nominal 180,000 per LNG Prime/offshore-energy/Deltamarin. Deltamarin soft-blocked from curl (HTTP 000) but content-confirmed via browser: 'Cargo capacity of 180,000 cbm, or 176,400 cbm at 98%'.
Same as 1216 (hull -08). Nominal 180,000 cbm; CSB 176,400 = 98% figure, dropped from capacity [ref].
